hero.name: Gustavo Dropa
hero.title: Fullstack Developer
hero.subtitle: Software Engineer at Myrp · PHP · Vue.js · TypeScript

about.title: About me
about.text: Fullstack Developer with 5+ years of experience. Currently Software Engineer at Myrp, with a background as co-founder and Tech Lead at FiqOn startup. Specialized in PHP/Laravel and Node.js on the backend and Vue.js/TypeScript on the frontend. Experienced in high-ownership environments, technical leadership, system architecture, and delivering scalable products.

roles.title: Software Engineer
bullets: Built an Offline-First Mobile POS system capable of operating without internet connectivity.
Implemented tax compliance flows: NFe, NFCe, NFCom, and NFSe.
Integrated SSO with Keycloak for unified authentication across systems.
Modernized legacy CSHTML/Knockout.js codebases to Vue 3 with Pug and Vuetify.
Scrum methodology with weekly alignment and daily standups.

roles.title: Co-founder · Tech Lead & Full Stack Developer
bullets: Architected and developed the backend in PHP/Laravel and Node.js for a no-code integration platform.
Built the no-code frontend editor with Vue.js and VueFlow (visual flow editor).
DevOps: GCP infrastructure, Docker, RabbitMQ, and Go microservices.
Technical leadership: code reviews, quality standards, and team mentoring.
Part of the founding team that raised R$3 million from an angel investor.

roles.title: Full Stack Developer
bullets: Fullstack development with PHP (Codeigniter) and Vue 2.
MySQL and MongoDB database design with Sequelize in Node.js.
Built a time-tracking module for Continental AG, eliminating manual processes.

items.name: Conta Ponto
items.description: App that receives timecard photos and generates monthly work-hours reports using OCR and AI (Claude + Gemini). Leverages multiple AI models to convert visual data into structured, actionable time-tracking reports.
items.problem: Converting scattered timecard photos into organized monthly reports is tedious and error-prone, costing professionals hours of manual data entry.
items.impact: Automates time tracking with AI-powered OCR, saving 2+ hours monthly per user while improving accuracy to 95%+.
items.metrics: Multi-AI integration (Claude + Gemini) with advanced document processing and structured output generation.

items.name: Agenda Barber
items.description: Barber scheduling system with validated forms, date selection, and dark/light theme support. Built with modern form validation and responsive design for seamless appointment management.
items.problem: Barber shop scheduling is error-prone, leading to double-bookings and customer confusion when managing multiple appointments.
items.impact: Provides barbers and salon owners with a streamlined, reliable booking system that eliminates scheduling conflicts and improves customer satisfaction.
items.metrics: Zod validation + React Hook Form for bulletproof form handling and excellent user experience.

items.name: Olfactory Quiz
items.description: Interactive fragrance signature quiz that guides users through questions to discover their perfect perfume match. Animated with smooth Framer Motion transitions for an engaging experience.
items.problem: Customers struggle to identify their preferred fragrance profile among countless options, often purchasing the wrong scent.
items.impact: Helps perfume shoppers discover personalized recommendations through an interactive, intuitive quiz experience.
items.metrics: Smooth animations and micro-interactions using Framer Motion create high engagement and user delight.

items.institution: UTFPR — Federal Technological University of Paraná
Written and spoken · Experience with American companies

items.degree: Scientific Research — CUDA & Cellular Automata on GPUs
